# railway_webhook (Resource)

Railway webhook. Sends HTTP POST notifications to a URL when events occur in a project.

!!! warning "Not currently functional"
    Webhook types (`WebhookCreateInput`, `ProjectWebhook`) are not in Railway's public GraphQL schema. This resource is implemented and passes mock tests, but **live API calls will fail** until Railway re-adds these types to their schema.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "railway_webhook" "deploy_notifications" {
  project_id = railway_project.example.id
  url        = "https://example.com/webhooks/railway"
}
```

### With Event Filters

```terraform
resource "railway_webhook" "deploy_only" {
  project_id = railway_project.example.id
  url        = "https://example.com/webhooks/railway"
  filters    = ["deploy.completed", "deploy.started"]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `project_id` (String) Identifier of the project the webhook belongs to.
- `url` (String) URL of the webhook.

### Optional

- `filters` (List of String) List of event filters for the webhook.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Identifier of the webhook.

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

```shell
tofu import railway_webhook.deploy_notifications <project_id>:<webhook_id>
```
